content.text: In this Constitution, unless the context otherwise requires: "Assembly" means the Legislative Assembly; "Bill of Rights" means Part I of this Constitution; "Caymanian" means a person who possesses Caymanian status under the law in force in the Cayman Islands; "Court of Appeal" means the Court of Appeal established by section 99; "functions" includes powers, duties and responsibilities; "Government" means the Government of the Cayman Islands; "Governor" means the Governor of the Cayman Islands; "Grand Court" means the Grand Court established by section 94; "high judicial office" means the office of a judge of a court having unlimited jurisdiction in civil and criminal matters; "law" includes any instrument having the force of law; "Legislature" means the Legislature of the Cayman Islands established by section 59; "Minister" means a member of the Cabinet other than an ex officio member; "Premier" means the Premier appointed under section 49; "public office" means any office of emolument in the public service; "public officer" means a person holding or acting in any public office.
